name: António Guterres
quote: We are on a highway to climate hell with our foot still on the accelerator. Renewable energy is the only true path. We need an end to fossil fuel expansion — now.

name: Ursula von der Leyen
quote: AccelerateEU is Europe's answer to energy insecurity: accelerate homegrown clean energy and end our dependence on volatile fossil fuel markets. With €660 billion per year invested in clean energy through 2030, we will never again be held hostage by geopolitical shocks. Every euro saved on gas imports is a euro invested in European renewables.

name: John Kerry
role: US Special Presidential Envoy for Climate (2021–2024)
quote: The United States is not just back at the table on climate — we're committed to leading. The Inflation Reduction Act is the largest climate investment in the history of any nation. The private sector is responding.

name: Xi Jinping
quote: China will scale up its intended nationally determined contributions, peak CO2 emissions before 2030, and achieve carbon neutrality before 2060. China will strictly control coal power generation projects. Nature will benefit from China's efforts.

name: Narendra Modi
quote: India will achieve net zero by 2070. We will reach 500 GW non-fossil energy capacity by 2030 — 50% of our electricity from renewables. No country has made a more ambitious per-unit-of-GDP climate commitment.

name: Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva
quote: Brazil is back on the world stage as a protagonist in the fight against climate change. We are committed to zero deforestation of the Amazon by 2030. The forest is our greatest treasure and our best climate solution.

name: Sultan Al Jaber
quote: The UAE Consensus sends a clear signal: the era of fossil fuels must come to an end. We have agreed to transition away from fossil fuels in energy systems in a just, orderly, and equitable manner. This is historic.

name: Christiana Figueres
role: Former UNFCCC Executive Secretary; Paris Agreement Architect
quote: Paris was possible because we dared to be optimistic. Climate action is now the greatest economic opportunity of the 21st century. Stubborn optimism is not naive — it is a choice, and it is the only viable strategy.

name: Greta Thunberg
role: Climate Activist, Fridays for Future Founder
quote: You say you love your children above all else, yet you are stealing their future in front of their very eyes. How dare you. We are in the beginning of a mass extinction and all you can talk about is money and fairy tales of eternal economic growth.

name: Mark Carney
role: UN Special Envoy on Climate Action & Finance
quote: The transition to a net-zero economy will be the greatest commercial opportunity of our times. Glasgow Financial Alliance for Net Zero represents over $130 trillion in assets — the private sector is aligned. Now policy must deliver the roadmap.

name: Fatih Birol
quote: Solar is now the cheapest source of electricity in history. There is no need to build new oil or gas fields if the world is serious about net zero. Clean energy is not just good for the climate — it is increasingly the most economic choice.

name: Inger Andersen
quote: Nature-based solutions can deliver up to a third of the mitigation needed to stay on track for 1.5°C. Protecting and restoring forests, wetlands, and coastal ecosystems is not optional — it is essential climate infrastructure.

name: Wopke Hoekstra
quote: The energy crisis has been a reality check. At Santa Marta we reaffirmed that Europe's clean energy ambition is also energy security policy. Europe's legally binding 90% emissions reduction by 2040 sends an unambiguous signal — the European Green Deal is Europe's biggest competitive advantage in the global clean energy race.

name: John Podesta
role: US Senior Advisor for Clean Energy Innovation and Implementation
quote: The IRA has catalyzed over $400 billion in private clean energy investment in less than two years. It's the most significant climate legislation in American history, and it's working — factories are opening, jobs are being created, emissions are falling.

name: Vanessa Nakate
role: Ugandan Climate Activist, UNICEF Goodwill Ambassador
quote: Africa is on the front lines of the climate crisis despite contributing less than 4% of global emissions. Loss and damage funding is not charity — it is justice. The voices of African youth must be heard at every COP.
